name: provenance: refetcher recomputes content_hash and writes the new value when content changed
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/refetch-source.sh" --rule-file "$PWD/rule.yaml" --fetcher-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" && grep -E 'content_hash: sha256:NEW' rule.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:OLD
rules: []
' > rule.yaml
